descriptions: Infoboox lists Original Stanley Grove as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Original Stanley Grove

'Ndrina Cua.description: The 'Ndrina Cua is a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Natile di Careri, Calabria, Italy. It is active in the appropriation of public contracts and international drug trafficking. The group has been involved in large-scale cocaine trafficking from South America to Europe, with operations spanning multiple countries. It has been targeted in major anti-mafia operations such as Minotauro and European 'Ndrangheta connection.

descriptions: 'Ndrina Cua is a part of the Locale di Natile di Careri.
edges.evidence_quote: Cua è una 'ndrina di Natile di Careri , in provincia di Reggio Calabria , e facente parte del Locale di Natile di Careri .

Bình Xuyên.description: The Bình Xuyên was an independent military force within the Vietnamese National Army, originally a coalition of gangs and contract laborers formed in the early 1920s in Saigon. It funded itself through organized crime activities such as kidnapping, piracy, and extortion while fighting Communist forces. Led by General Lê Văn Viễn, it was active from 1945 to 1960 and was eventually defeated by the South Vietnamese government.

descriptions: Supreme Team was allied with and supplied cocaine by Lorenzo Nichols gang.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1987, the Supreme Team was allied with another drug gang, led by Lorenzo "Fat Cat" Nichols, who supplied the Supreme Team with powder cocaine.

descriptions: Hells Angels attacked Wargs Brotherhood, a support group for Vikings.
edges.evidence_quote: On 7 November 2018, members of the Hells Angels' Slough chapter and the affiliated Red Devils ambushed six members of the Vikings and their support group the Wargs Brotherhood.

Night Wolves.description: Russian motorcycle club founded in 1989 by Alexander Zaldastanov. It has chapters worldwide and is known for its close ties to the Kremlin and involvement in pro-Russian political activities, including the annexation of Crimea and the war in Donbas. The club also runs rock clubs, tattoo parlors, and a clothing line.

descriptions: Infobox lists Espanyola as an affiliate, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Pyatnashka Brigade, Interbrigades, Rusich, Espanyola

descriptions: Infobox lists Interbrigades as an affiliate, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Pyatnashka Brigade, Interbrigades, Rusich, Espanyola

descriptions: Night Wolves formed a unit that joined Pyatnashka Brigade, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: On 24 October 2022, during the Russo-Ukrainian War, the club formed a volunteer unit which joined the Pyatnashka International Brigade.

descriptions: Infobox lists Rusich as an affiliate, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Pyatnashka Brigade, Interbrigades, Rusich, Espanyola

descriptions: Night Wolves member killed in dispute with Three Roads, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A member of the Night Wolves, Valery Bely, was shot and killed in a dispute with a rival biker club, Three Roads, in November 2012.

'Ndrina Scumaci.description: The 'Ndrina Scumaci is a 'ndrina (criminal clan) of the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria, based in the province of Catanzaro. It is allied with other 'ndrine such as the Grande Aracri, Trapasso-Zoffreo, Mannolo, and Tropea-Talarico. The clan is involved in organized crime activities typical of the 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: Mannolo and Scumaci operated together in the same areas and were arrested in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 2 agosto 2001, con l'operazione Polifemo dei Carabinieri di Sellia Marina vengono arrestati componenti della cosca Mannolo e Scumaci che operavano nelle zone di Sellia Marina e San Leonardo di Cutro .

descriptions: The Scumaci are allied with the Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e Mannolo di Cutro e con i Tropea-Talarico di Cropani .

descriptions: The Scumaci are allied with the Mannolo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e Mannolo di Cutro e con i Tropea-Talarico di Cropani .

descriptions: The Scumaci are allied with the Trapasso-Zoffreo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e Mannolo di Cutro e con i Tropea-Talarico di Cropani .

descriptions: The Scumaci are allied with the Tropea-Talarico.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e Mannolo di Cutro e con i Tropea-Talarico di Cropani .

D'Aquila crime family.description: One of the earliest crime families in New York City, based in Manhattan's Little Italy. Founded by Salvatore D'Aquila in the 1910s after breaking off from the Morello family and absorbing remnants of the Brooklyn Camorra. Active in racketeering, extortion, and murder until D'Aquila's murder in 1928, after which the family was taken over by Manfredi Mineo and eventually became part of the modern Gambino crime family.

descriptions: D'Aquila ordered the murders of Morello and Lupo.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1920, both Morello and Lupo were released from prison and Brooklyn Mafia boss Salvatore D'Aquila ordered their murders.

descriptions: D'Aquila family was a predecessor of the Gambino crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: It was a predecessor of the modern-day Gambino crime family

descriptions: The infobox lists the Morello crime family as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Morello crime family

descriptions: D'Aquila was originally a crew of the Morello family before splitting off.
edges.evidence_quote: originally a crew of the Morello family prior to breaking off

descriptions: The D'Aquila crime family is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brooklyn Camorra , D'Aquila crime family , Schiro crime family

'Ndrina Iamonte.description: The 'Ndrina Iamonte is a historical 'ndrina of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta, originating from Melito Porto Salvo, Italy. It is involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, public contracts, and arms and explosives trafficking. The organization has expanded its operations to various Italian regions and Eastern Europe. It has been targeted by multiple police operations since the 1990s.

descriptions: The Barreca were in conflict with the Iamonte during the faida di Pellaro.
edges.evidence_quote: faida di Pellaro scoppiata durante il periodo '86-'89 tra Ambrogio-Iamonte-Barreca-Chila

descriptions: The Malacrinò are allied 'ndrine of the Iamonte.
edges.evidence_quote: I Moscato e i Malacrinò sono 'ndrine loro alleate.

descriptions: The Iamonte are allies of the Moscato.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Moscato.

descriptions: Paviglianiti and Iamonte were favored together in corruption schemes.
edges.evidence_quote: favorendo le 'ndrine degli Iamonte e dei Paviglianiti.

descriptions: The Paviglianiti and Iamonte were members of the same 'locale' in Val di Cembra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il Locale sarebbe composto da membri dei Serraino, Paviglianiti e Iamonte .

descriptions: The Serraino, Paviglianiti, and Iamonte were members of the same 'locale' in Val di Cembra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il Locale sarebbe composto da membri dei Serraino, Paviglianiti e Iamonte .

descriptions: Suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Iamonte.
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ... e con la 'ndrina Iamonte

descriptions: The Arifs were engaged in a gangland war with the Brindle family during the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Following the downfall of the Kray brothers , the Arifs were one of several criminal organisations who took control of the London underworld including the Clerkenwell crime syndicate and the Brindle family. with whom they were engaged in a highly publicised gangland war during the 1990s.

Forty Thieves.description: The Forty Thieves were a New York City criminal street gang formed in 1825 by Edward Coleman, primarily composed of Irish immigrants and Irish Americans. Based in the Five Points neighborhood of Manhattan, they engaged in street fighting, assault, murder, and robbery. The gang dissolved by 1850, with members joining larger gangs or leaving.

descriptions: Bowery Boys listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bowery Boys , Roach Guards

descriptions: Chichesters listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters , Shirt Tails , Kerryonians , Dead Rabbits , Tammany Hall

descriptions: Dead Rabbits listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters , Shirt Tails , Kerryonians , Dead Rabbits , Tammany Hall

descriptions: Kerryonians listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters , Shirt Tails , Kerryonians , Dead Rabbits , Tammany Hall

descriptions: Little Forty Thieves was an apprentice gang of the original Forty Thieves.
edges.evidence_quote: The juvenile Little Forty Thieves , an apprentice street gang of the original Forty Thieves, would outlast their mentors, continuing to commit illegal activities throughout the 1850s before eventually joining the later street gangs following the American Civil War in 1865.

descriptions: Roach Guards listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bowery Boys , Roach Guards

descriptions: Shirt Tails listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters , Shirt Tails , Kerryonians , Dead Rabbits , Tammany Hall

'Ndrina Barbaro.description: The 'Ndrina Barbaro is a powerful 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Platì, Calabria, Italy. Founded in the late 19th century, it is one of the oldest still-active 'ndrine. The family has multiple branches and is heavily involved in drug trafficking and arms possession. It has expanded its operations across northern Italy and into Australia, particularly in Melbourne and Griffith.

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina is a constituent family of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Examples include the Barbaro 'ndrina, from Platì, named after the Barbaro family;

descriptions: The Barbaro are a component 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: I Barbaro sono una 'ndrina originaria di Platì, considerata tra le più potenti cosche della 'ndrangheta.

descriptions: The Barbaro clan is a 'ndrina (sub-unit) of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: I Barbaro sono una 'ndrina originaria di Platì, considerata tra le più potenti cosche della 'ndrangheta.

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta organization.
edges.evidence_quote: The Barbaro 'ndrina is a powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Francesco Barbaro ... was a boss of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: The Barbaro 'ndrina is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Barbaro ... is a boss of the 'Ndrangheta, a Mafia-type criminal organisation based in Calabria, Italy. He is a son of Francesco Barbaro, one of the leaders of the Barbaro 'ndrina based in Platì.

descriptions: The Paparo are allied with the Barbaro, Bubbo, Nicoscia, and Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: i Paparo alleati dei Barbaro, dei Bubbo, dei Nicoscia e degli Arena

descriptions: The Paparo are allied with the Barbaro, Bubbo, Nicoscia, and Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: i Paparo alleati dei Barbaro, dei Bubbo, dei Nicoscia e degli Arena

descriptions: Barbaro and Mammoliti were in conflict in the Castellace feud, won by Mammoliti.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Castellace faida nata nel 1954 e durata fino al 1978 tra i Barbaro e i Mammoliti, e vinta da questi ultimi.

descriptions: The Barbaro were involved in a feud with the Mammoliti in the 1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni Cinquanta, quando risiedevano ancora a Castellace furono coinvolti in una faida con i Mammoliti.

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina fought a feud with Mammoliti 'ndrina in the 1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1950s the clan was involved in a bloody feud with the Mammoliti 'ndrina

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina fought a feud with Mammoliti 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1950s the clan was involved in a bloody feud with the Mammoliti 'ndrina

descriptions: The Barbaro-Papalia, Mancuso, and Ursino-Macrì were involved in drug trafficking together.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Tamburo ... ha portato all'arresto per traffico di droga di 13 persone, presunte affiliate ai Mancuso, Barbaro-Papalia e agli Ursino-Macrì.

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina is associated through blood relations with Marando 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of the 'Ndrangheta clans in Platì, such as Trimboli, Sergi, Romeo, Zappia, Papalia and Marando are associated through blood relations, which center around the Barbaro.

descriptions: The Paparo are allied with the Barbaro, Bubbo, Nicoscia, and Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: i Paparo alleati dei Barbaro, dei Bubbo, dei Nicoscia e degli Arena

descriptions: The Barbaro are linked to the Papalia 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono legati alla cosca dei Papalia e dei Paparo.

descriptions: The Barbaro and Papalia clans are linked, operating together in Buccinasco.
edges.evidence_quote: Viene condannato per la prima volta per i suoi legami con i Papalia -Barbaro di Buccinasco nel giugno 2010

descriptions: Papalia 'ndrina is an ally of Barbaro 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Papalia 'ndrina

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina is associated through blood relations with Papalia 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of the 'Ndrangheta clans in Platì, such as Trimboli, Sergi, Romeo, Zappia, Papalia and Marando are associated through blood relations, which center around the Barbaro.

descriptions: Barbaro once encompassed Papalia as a branch.
edges.evidence_quote: it began as a branch of the powerful Barbaro 'ndrina , which during that period also encompassed the Papalia , Agresta, Trimboli , Perre, Sergi 'ndrine , among others.

descriptions: Papalia originated from Barbaro.
edges.evidence_quote: a branch of the powerful Barbaro 'ndrina, from which several other 'ndrine also originated, including the Papalia, Sergi, and Perre 'ndrine

descriptions: The Barbaro are linked to the Paparo 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono legati alla cosca dei Papalia e dei Paparo.

descriptions: Marianna Barbaro is married to Giuseppe Pelle, linking the Barbaro and Pelle clans through marriage.
edges.evidence_quote: Marianna Barbaro (1967), figlia di Francesco, è la moglie di Giuseppe Pelle

descriptions: Pelle 'ndrina is an ally of Barbaro 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Pelle 'ndrina

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina formed a tight alliance with Pelle 'ndrina through marriage.
edges.evidence_quote: One of his daughters married Giuseppe Pelle , one of the four sons of Antonio Pelle , the 'Ndrangheta boss from San Luca , securing a tight alliance between the two powerful 'ndrine .

descriptions: The Barbaro collaborated with the Black Uhlans in ecstasy trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il traffico era gestito in collaborazione con l'associazione criminale di motociclisti dei Black Uhlans.

descriptions: The Barbaro and the Camorra clan La Torre were involved in a cocaine trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: vengono sequestrati quasi 700 kg di cocaina e beni dal valore di 80 milioni di euro ai Barbaro e al clan della camorra casertana La Torre.

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina cooperated in a cocaine trafficking cartel with the Mafia family of Mariano Agate.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan participated in a cartel of 'Ndrangheta families involved in cocaine trafficking with the Mafia family of Mariano Agate .

descriptions: The Barbaro 'ndrina cooperated with the Mafia family of Mariano Agate in a cocaine trafficking cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan participated in a cartel of 'Ndrangheta families involved in cocaine trafficking with the Mafia family of Mariano Agate.

descriptions: Molluso 'ndrina is an ally of Barbaro 'ndrina.

edges.evidence_quote: a branch of the powerful Barbaro 'ndrina, from which several other 'ndrine also originated, including the Papalia, Sergi, and Perre 'ndrine

edges.evidence_quote: In Australia sono alleati con i Sergi

descriptions: Sergi 'ndrina is an ally of Barbaro 'ndrina.

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina is associated through blood relations with Sergi 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of the 'Ndrangheta clans in Platì, such as Trimboli, Sergi, Romeo, Zappia, Papalia and Marando are associated through blood relations, which center around the Barbaro.

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina cooperated with Sicilian Mafia in a cocaine trafficking cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: participating in a cartel of 'Ndrangheta families involved in cocaine trafficking with the Sicilian Mafia family of Mariano Agate

descriptions: Trimboli 'ndrina is an ally of Barbaro 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Trimboli 'ndrina

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina is associated through blood relations with Trimboli 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of the 'Ndrangheta clans in Platì, such as Trimboli, Sergi, Romeo, Zappia, Papalia and Marando are associated through blood relations, which center around the Barbaro.

descriptions: Barbaro once encompassed Trimboli as a branch.
edges.evidence_quote: it began as a branch of the powerful Barbaro 'ndrina , which during that period also encompassed the Papalia , Agresta, Trimboli , Perre, Sergi 'ndrine , among others.

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina was part of a joint venture with several other 'ndrine for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: A joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in the trafficking included the Barbaro 'ndrina (Platì), Ierinò 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica), Morabito 'ndrina (Africo), Mazzaferro 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica) and Pesce 'ndrina (Rosarno).

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Barbaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Mammoliti and Barbaro were in a faida (feud) starting in the 1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni Cinquanta scoppia una faida con i Barbaro di Castellace .

descriptions: The Mazzaferro have contacts with the Barbaro.

descriptions: The Papalia are allied with the Barbaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Barbaro , dei Sergi , dei Trimboli , tutti originari di Platì .

descriptions: The Papalia originated under the protection of the Barbaro.
edges.evidence_quote: I Papalia nascono come 'ndrina a Platì sotto l'egida dei Barbaro .

edges.evidence_quote: The 'ndrina originated as a branch of the powerful Barbaro 'ndrina

edges.evidence_quote: alleata ... dei Barbaro

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina , Catania Mafia family , Colombian drug cartels

descriptions: The Serraino and Barbaro were among the families that formed La Santa.
edges.evidence_quote: Le famiglie che permisero questo furono i De Stefano , i Piromalli , i Musolino, i Serraino, i Nirta , i Barbaro e gli Alvaro .

descriptions: The Trovato have alliances with the Barbaro 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno alleanze con le 'ndrine originarie di Platì come i Barbaro , i Papalia e i Sergi

descriptions: La Torre clan and Barbaro 'ndrina cooperated in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: The Tamanaco operation that ended on 22 June 2010, destroyed a drug trafficking operation managed by the La Torre clan from Mondragone and the Barbaro 'ndrina from Platì .

descriptions: Cosa Nostra clans from Trapani and Mazara del Vallo allied with 'Ndrangheta clans Marando and Barbaro for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2007 l'operazione Stupor Mundi sgomina un traffico internazionale di droga gestito dai Marando e dai Barbaro di Platì che portavano la droga passante dal Belgio e dai Paesi Bassi in Piemonte e Lombardia in alleanza con le cosche del trapanese, di Mazara del Vallo.

descriptions: Trimboli originated as a branch of Barbaro.
edges.evidence_quote: The Trimboli 'ndrina emerged around the 1970s as a branch of the powerful Barbaro 'ndrina

Almighty Black P. Stone Nation.description: American street gang founded in Chicago in the late 1950s by Eugene Hairston and Jeff Fort. Originally the Blackstone Rangers, it later adopted an Islamic faction called El Rukn. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, money laundering, murder, and robbery, and is part of the People Nation alliance. It is considered Chicago's most powerful street gang and has been linked to terrorism conspiracies with Libya.

descriptions: Black P. Stones has a long-running conflict with the 18th Street gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black P. Stones have also been involved in a long-running conflict with the 18th Street gang , a Latino gang which is based in a territory north of Baldwin Village.

'Ndrina Molè.description: The 'Ndrina Molè is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in the Gioia Tauro plain, Italy. Originally allied with the Piromalli clan, it controlled drug trafficking in the area from the 1980s-1990s, dealing cannabis and cocaine from Colombian cartels. The clan was heavily targeted in the 1993 operation Tirreno, leading to numerous arrests. In the 2000s, it split from the Piromalli and faced further law enforcement operations.

descriptions: Alvaro had links with Piromalli and Molè.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia collegamenti con i Piromalli e i Molè

descriptions: Asciutto-Neri-Grimaldi are linked to Molè as part of the dominant group.
edges.evidence_quote: legate al gruppo dominante sull’intera piana di Gioia Tauro delle famiglie mafiose dei Piromalli e dei Molè

descriptions: The Bellocco are allied with the Molè 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: sono anche alleati con i Molè

descriptions: Bellocco and Molè were both targeted in the same anti-mafia operation, indicating they are part of the same criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: 14 settembre 2021: Operazione Crypto contro i Piromalli, i Molè , i Bellocco, i Pesce e i Cacciola-Certo-Pronestì.

descriptions: The Mandalari are allies of the Molè.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei ... Molè

descriptions: Members of Alvaro, Piromalli, and Molè were arrested together in the same operation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 23 luglio 2008 nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia vengono arrestate 18 persone degli Alvaro , Piromalli e Molè .

descriptions: The Molè, Bellocco, Piromalli, Avignone, and Paviglianiti were targeted together in the same anti-mafia operation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 23 marzo 2017: operazione Gerry contro le cosche Bellocco , Piromalli , Molè, Avignone e Paviglianiti .

descriptions: The Molè and Pesce families were involved together in a counterfeit goods trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 22 dicembre 2009 i carabinieri di Reggio Calabria arrestano 26 persone per un traffico di merci contraffatte ad opera delle famiglie Pesce e Molè

descriptions: The Molè were formerly allied with the Piromalli.
edges.evidence_quote: I Molè sono una 'ndrina della piana di Gioia Tauro , un tempo alleata con i Piromalli .

descriptions: The Molè, Piromalli, and Alvaro formed a partnership with the Casamonica clan for money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e affiliati alla 'Ndrangheta dei Piromalli -Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: Pesce formed an alliance with Molè, Piromalli, and Mancuso for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno sancito un'alleanza per il controllo del territorio della piana di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Piromalli , i Mancuso e ai Molè .

descriptions: Pesce and Molè were arrested for trafficking counterfeit goods.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 22 dicembre 2009 i carabinieri di Reggio Calabria arrestano 26 persone per un traffico di merci contraffatte ad opera delle famiglie Pesce e Molè

descriptions: Pesce, Molè, Piromalli, and Alvaro were targeted together for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 agosto 2016 si conclude l'operazione "Vulcano" nei confronti di 12 presunti esponenti delle famiglie Piromalli , Molè , Alvaro e Pesce accusati di traffico internazionale di droga.

descriptions: Piromalli and Molè cooperated in money laundering and company formation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta dei Piromalli- Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti e costituzione di società

descriptions: Piromalli and Molè are allied, often referred to as Piromalli-Molè clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Piromalli's are allied with their relatives of the Molè family

descriptions: Piromalli split from Molè in the 2000s, indicating a structural change.
edges.evidence_quote: Anni 2000 - Il traffico di droga e la scissione dai Molè

descriptions: Molè helped Piromalli and Longo kill Versace.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie all'aiuto di vecchi alleati - i Piromalli - Molè di Gioia Tauro - riuscirono ad ucciderlo

descriptions: Casamonica members formed a partnership with Molè family for money laundering in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta delle famiglie Piromalli - Molè - Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: Commisso and Molè were allies against Costa in the Siderno feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Ebbe termine nei primi anni novanta dopo più di 50 morti e vide un forte ridimensionamento dei Costa , sconfitti dai Commisso che ebbero l'aiuto di altre cosche reggine come i Molè e i Piromalli

descriptions: Insane Spanish Cobras are listed as rivals of the Gaylords in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Folk Nation , Insane Deuces, Simon City Royals , Insane Spanish Cobras , Maniac Latin Disciples , C-Notes, Insane North Side Popes

'Ndrina Vallelunga.description: The Vallelunga, also known as the Viperari, are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Serra San Bruno, Calabria, Italy. Active since the 1960s, they are considered the hegemonic clan in the mountainous territory spanning the provinces of Catanzaro, Vibo Valentia, and Reggio Calabria. They have been involved in numerous feuds for territorial control, including the Faida dei boschi in the late 1980s, and are regarded as one of the most powerful and bloodiest clans in Calabria.

descriptions: Gallace sided against Vallelunga in the 'faida dei boschi'.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1977 la tensione sale di nuovo tra le cosche esplose in un conflitto: la 'faida dei boschi', che vedeva da una parte la 'ndrina Vallelunga ... dall'altra ... per cui parteggiavano i Gallace.

descriptions: The Sia 'ndrina is allied with the Vallelunga 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: È alleata dei Vallelunga di Serra San Bruno

descriptions: The Vallelunga and Turrà were opposed to the Ciconte and their allies in the Faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: alleati dei Turrà, contrapporsi allo schieramento formato dagli Emanuele di Mongiana (intesi strazzi), agli Emanuele di Santa Caterina, ai Ciconte di Serra San Bruno e ai Nardo di Soriano

descriptions: The Vallelunga and Turrà were opposed to the Emanuele di Mongiana and their allies in the Faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: alleati dei Turrà, contrapporsi allo schieramento formato dagli Emanuele di Mongiana (intesi strazzi), agli Emanuele di Santa Caterina, ai Ciconte di Serra San Bruno e ai Nardo di Soriano

descriptions: The Vallelunga and Turrà were opposed to the Emanuele di Santa Caterina and their allies in the Faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: alleati dei Turrà, contrapporsi allo schieramento formato dagli Emanuele di Mongiana (intesi strazzi), agli Emanuele di Santa Caterina, ai Ciconte di Serra San Bruno e ai Nardo di Soriano

descriptions: Vallelunga was part of the Sia alliance feuding with Gallace.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 2008 e il 2010 è scoppiata una faida tra i Sia-Procopio- Novella - Vallelunga e i Gallace - Ruga-Metastasio

descriptions: The Chiefari were part of the Vallelunga locale before the 2009 faida.
edges.evidence_quote: il locale guidato da Damiano Vallelunga era formato da sette 'ndrine operanti in sette paesi diversi: i Chiefari a Torre di Ruggiero

descriptions: The Iozzo were part of the Vallelunga locale before the 2009 faida.
edges.evidence_quote: il locale guidato da Damiano Vallelunga era formato da sette 'ndrine operanti in sette paesi diversi: ... gli Iozzo a Chiaravalle

descriptions: The Vallelunga and Turrà were opposed to the Nardo and their allies in the Faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: alleati dei Turrà, contrapporsi allo schieramento formato dagli Emanuele di Mongiana (intesi strazzi), agli Emanuele di Santa Caterina, ai Ciconte di Serra San Bruno e ai Nardo di Soriano

descriptions: The Vallelunga have ties with the Sia-Procopio-Lentini cosca.
edges.evidence_quote: hanno stretto legami con la cosca Sia-Procopio-Lentini attiva nel soveratese

descriptions: The Procopio-Lentini were part of the Vallelunga locale before the 2009 faida.
edges.evidence_quote: il locale guidato da Damiano Vallelunga era formato da sette 'ndrine operanti in sette paesi diversi: ... i Procopio-Lentini a San Sostene

descriptions: The Vallelunga were opposed to the Ruga-Leuzzi-Vallelonga cartel in the Nuova Faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: I Vallelunga furono protagonisti di questa guerra che li vide contrapposti ai clan Ruga-Leuzzi-Vallelonga

descriptions: Vallelunga and Sia were allies against Gallace-Ruga-Metastasio in the second boschi feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida dei boschi : scoppiata nel 2008 e conclusa nel 2013 ... tra i Vallelunga , Novella , Sia , Tripodi, Procopio e Lentini contro i Gallace , Ruga e Metastasio.

descriptions: The Sia were part of the Vallelunga locale before the 2009 faida.
edges.evidence_quote: il locale guidato da Damiano Vallelunga era formato da sette 'ndrine operanti in sette paesi diversi: ... i Sia a Soverato

descriptions: The Vallelunga are historically allied with the Turrà.
edges.evidence_quote: Storicamente alleati dei Turrà di Guardavalle

descriptions: Vallelunga and Novella were allies against Gallace-Ruga-Metastasio in the second boschi feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida dei boschi : scoppiata nel 2008 e conclusa nel 2013 ... tra i Vallelunga , Novella , Sia , Tripodi, Procopio e Lentini contro i Gallace , Ruga e Metastasio.

descriptions: Henchmen MC patched over to become Outlaws chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: The first Welsh Outlaws chapter was formed in 1993 following a "patch over" of the Henchmen MC, which was founded in North Wales in 1969.

Highwaymen Motorcycle Club.description: The Highwaymen Motorcycle Club is a one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in Detroit, Michigan in 1954. It is the largest motorcycle club in the Detroit area with over 400 members and chapters in several U.S. states. The club has been the subject of major FBI investigations in 1973, 1987, and 2007, resulting in convictions for racketeering, drug trafficking, and other crimes. Despite its outlaw status, the group has recently shown affinity for law enforcement.

descriptions: The Highwaymen MC is listed as an ally of the Detroit Partnership.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Highwaymen MC

descriptions: Highwaymen became a puppet club of Hells Angels in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: the Highwaymen became a puppet club

descriptions: Infobox lists Highwaymen MC as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Devils Diciples MC, Diablos MC, El Forastero MC, Galloping Goose MC, Hells Angels MC, Highwaymen MC, Iron Horsemen MC, Loners MC, Mongols MC, Pagans MC, Red Devils MC, Sons of Silence MC, Warlocks MC

descriptions: The Highwaymen are a rival biker gang of the Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: Rival biker gangs of the Outlaws include the Devils Diciples, the Diablos, El Forastero, the Galloping Goose, the Hells Angels, the Highwaymen

descriptions: 4GMz are rivals of Latin Counts per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sureños, 12st Players, Almighty Bishops, 4GMz, SVLz, Latin Kings, Two Six, 22Boys, Almighty Ambrose, La Raza, Satan Disciples, Krazy Getdown Boys, Imperial Gangsters, Maniac Latin Disciples, Spanish Gangster Disciples, Insane Deuces, Folk Nation

descriptions: Aryan Guard members bombed a WEB member's home, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On the morning of November 21, 2009, two homemade bombs were left on the doorstep of WEB (Western European Bloodline) member Tyler Sturrup.

descriptions: Shower was formed by younger members of Ghetto Boys as a splinter group.
edges.evidence_quote: Younger members of the gang formed "Shower"

descriptions: Shower became associated with Tottenham Mandem, forming Shower Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: later became associated with the Tottenham Mandem , collectively calling themselves "Shower Syndicate"
